title: This Ex-Quant Had to Quit Wall Street to Build a 24/7 Stock Exchange | QFEX, Annanay Kapila
summary: Annanay Kapila, a former quantitative trader who managed $10 billion daily in trading strategies, left finance to build QFEX, a 24/7 global stock exchange. He critiques high-frequency trading as extracting value through structural flaws rather than adding genuine value, and discusses how financial sector compensation traps talented mathematicians and scientists away from meaningful work.
